nl_query: What is the average number of active grants per faculty user?
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, COUNT(DISTINCT uar.id) AS active_grants_count
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   user_auxiliary_role uar ON uar.user_id = fc.employee_id
WHERE  uar.scope_type = 'BOARD'
GROUP  BY fc.employee_id
ORDER  BY active_grants_count DESC
LIMIT  100;
